name: Zhejiang Shibao Company Limited
summary: Zhejiang Shibao Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, researches, designs, develops, produces, and sells automotive steering system and components in the People's Republic of China. The company offers automotive steering gears, and other components and parts of steering system. It also provides power recirculating ball steering gears for use in light, medium, and heavy duty trucks and buses; power rack-and-pinion steering gears and steering knuckles for passenger cars; and EPS systems for use in energy-saving and new energy vehicles. Zhejiang Shibao Company Limited supplies steering products to automakers. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China. Zhejiang Shibao Company Limited is a subsidiary of Zhejiang Shibao Holding Group Co., Ltd.
